title: Thrixspermum fimbriatum
taxonomy: Thrixspermum fimbriatum is classified as a species of orchid within the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Thrixspermum, which is a group of epiphytic orchids native to tropical Asia. The species Thrixspermum fimbriatum is further categorized as a type of orchid with showy, fimbriate flowers. Thrixspermum fimbriatum is a relatively rare and lesser-known species of orchid. It is primarily found in the wild in regions of Southeast Asia with high humidity and moderate temperatures.
